name: Butterfly

skills.name: Assassination
skills.description: Butterfly gains 2 stacks of mark from defeating heroes and 1 stack fromassisting or killing monsters/minions. At 3 stacks, the next skill used willnot enter cooldown.

skills.name: Whirlwind
skills.description: Butterfly deals damage to enemies around her and gains a shield. HerMovement Speed increases during this time.

skills.name: Sword Propel
skills.description: Butterfly deals damage in the target direction and inflicts slow.

skills.name: Death Dealer
skills.description: Butterfly jumps to the target and deals damagelf the target is defeated within a certain period of time, the cooldown of thisskill is refreshed.
